scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "user-auth,catalogue,auction,payment,notification,shipping,admin,admin-portal" "cd apps/user-auth && npx tsx watch --env-file .env src/main.ts" "cd apps/catalogue && npx tsx watch --env-file .env src/main.ts" "cd apps/auction-engine && npx tsx watch --env-file .env src/main.ts" "cd apps/payment && npx tsx watch --env-file .env src/main.ts" "cd apps/notification-service && npx tsx watch --env-file .env src/main.ts" "cd apps/shipping && npx tsx watch --env-file .env src/main.ts" "cd apps/admin && npx tsx watch --env-file .env src/main.ts" "cd apps/admin-portal && npx next dev -p 3008"
